2605.23249.title: Enhancing Deep Neural Network Reliability with Refinement and Calibration
2605.23249.paper_summary: Although deep neural networks (DNNs) achieve high predictive accuracy, their confidence estimates are often unreliable, potentially compromising user trust in their decisions. This has motivated research on calibrated models, where calibration measures how well a model's predicted confidence aligns with the empirical probability of correctness. However, calibration metrics can often be improved through post-processing techniques that merely mimic training-time uncertainty without genuinely improving the model's understanding. For this reason, statisticians recommend that models be not only calibrated but also refined. Intuitively, a model is considered more refined if it assigns significantly different confidence scores to correct and incorrect predictions, a property also referred to as sharpness. We observe that many existing calibration methods improve calibration at the cost of reduced refinement. To address this limitation, we propose: (1) a novel loss function that explicitly promotes refinement and can be optimized through supervised contrastive learning; and (2) a unified training framework, RefCal, that jointly optimizes calibration, refinement, and accuracy to improve DNN reliability. On the CIFAR-100-LT dataset with 10 percent class imbalance, RefCal achieves (accuracy, refinement, ECE) of (58.81, 95.67, 0.08), substantially outperforming the widely used Correctness Ranking Loss, which achieves (46.27, 93.7, 0.22).
2605.23249.paper_summary_zh: 儘管深度神經網絡（DNN）達到了高預測準確率，但它們的信心估計往往不可靠，這可能會損害用戶對其決策的信任。這促使了對校準模型的研究，其中校準衡量模型預測的信心與正確性經驗概率的對齊程度。然而，校準指標往往可以通過後處理技術來改進，這些技術僅僅模仿訓練期間的不確定性，而並未真正改善模型的理解。因此，統計學家建議模型不僅要進行校準，還要進行精煉。直觀上，如果模型對正確和不正確的預測分配了顯著不同的信心分數，則該模型被認為是更精煉的，這一特性也被稱為銳利度。我們觀察到，許多現有的校準方法在提高校準的同時，卻以降低精煉為代價。為了解決這一限制，我們提出：（1）一種新穎的損失函數，明確促進精煉，並可以通過監督對比學習進行優化；（2）一個統一的訓練框架RefCal，該框架共同優化校準、精煉和準確性，以提高DNN的可靠性。在CIFAR-100-LT數據集上，類別不平衡達到10％，RefCal的（準確性，精煉，ECE）為（58.81，95.67，0.08），顯著超越了廣泛使用的正確性排名損失，其結果為（46.27，93.7，0.22）。
2605.23249.author: Ramya Hebbalaguppe et.al.
2605.23249.authors: Ramya Hebbalaguppe, Ajay Shastry, Soumya Suvra Ghosal, Chetan Arora
